parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'anthropic/claude-3-5-haiku', messages: [{role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt}, {role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt}], response_format: {type: 'json_object'}, temperature: 0.8 }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, client_id: $json.client_id, client_name: $json.client_name, total: $json.posts.length, posts: $json.posts }) }}
